message:
Add explicit links to changelog authors and PRs

Enable the --explicit-links flag in tenzir-changelog CLI to generate
markdown links for author mentions and PR references. This allows
changelog entries to display authors as [@handle](url) and PRs as
[#123](url), making them clickable in rendered markdown instead of
plain text.

Updated formatAuthor() and PR rendering logic to handle both object
format {handle, url} and {number, url} from the CLI, converting them
to proper markdown links while preserving backward compatibility with
string formats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code <noreply@anthropic.com>
